allow: Bash(echo "---GitHub Desktop installed?---"; ls -d "/Applications/GitHub Desktop.app" 2>/dev/null && echo "YES installed" || echo "NOT installed"; echo "---size of folders that WILL be uploaded \(excludes ignored material folders\)---"; du -sh content hub index.html style.css "Study Plan.xlsx" "Study Plan - 📅 Weekly Schedule.pdf" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Initial commit: StudyHub study site *)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{RS="\\f"} {t=$0; gsub\(/\\n+/," ",t\); if\(t ~ /Technique #|How to prevent social loafing|Brainstorming|Nominal group|Electronic meeting|Devil/\) printf "p%d: %s\\n", NR, substr\(t,1,75\)}')
Bash(awk 'BEGIN{RS="\\f"} {t=$0; gsub\(/\\n+/," ",t\); if\(t ~ /Conflict Management Styles/\) printf "p%d: %s\\n", NR, substr\(t,1,120\)}')
Bash(awk 'BEGIN{RS="\\f"} {t=$0; gsub\(/\\n+/," ",t\); if\(t ~ /prevent social loafing|Group Decision Making|Improving Group|Strengths and Weaknesses/\) printf "p%d: %s\\n", NR, substr\(t,1,70\)}')
Bash(awk 'BEGIN{RS="\\f"} tolower\($0\) ~ /prevent social loafing/ {t=$0; gsub\(/\\n+/," ",t\); printf "p%d: %s\\n", NR, substr\(t,1,90\)}')
